form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 390m. Last start finished last on April 2 over 390m at this track behind Sutton's Magic beaten 8 lengths (22.16) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.75 lengths fourth (19.95) over 352m at this track. Has clocked an exceptional 19.57 Best Time here at the trip. Winning chance with a similar performance.
